improvements.title: Optimal JR-DR Synergy Mechanisms
improvements.description: Enhance complementary revelation through coordinated JR-DR responses

mechanisms.name: Evidence Layering
mechanisms.description: JR provides legal framework and factual basis, DR adds technical and operational depth
implementation: JR establishes legal principles and factual timeline
DR provides technical evidence and operational context
Together create comprehensive picture of legitimate operations

mechanisms.name: Cognitive Emergence
mechanisms.description: Separate JR and DR perspectives create emergent understanding beyond sum of parts
implementation: JR reveals Peter's strategic timing (T-9 months)
DR reveals operational bypass of trust mechanisms
Court recognizes coordinated payout capture scheme

mechanisms.name: Complementary Expertise
mechanisms.description: JR legal expertise + DR technical expertise = complete defense
implementation: JR addresses legal aspects and compliance
DR addresses technical operations and infrastructure

cross_references: Both reference common timeline and events

improvements.title: Optimal Law Resolution Pathways for Case 2025-137857

pathways.synergy_effect: Cognitive emergence of payout capture scheme
Complete picture of ex parte abuse

dr_strategy.focus: Technical evidence of platform ownership and funding

pathways.synergy_effect: Exposes RWD revenue hijacking and legitimizes UK investment
